patterns.message: Never import LiteLLM directly. The LiteLLM sidecar is an isolated process — use ILLMClient via HTTP gateway (lib/llm/client.ts). Direct LiteLLM imports break process isolation (Amendment 91).

no-restricted-syntax.message: exec() is banned — use execFileAsync() from lib/utils/exec-safe.ts with a string[] argument array. exec() with any dynamic value is a command injection risk (Amendment 92 C1).
child_process.exec() is banned — use execFileAsync() from lib/utils/exec-safe.ts. exec() is a command injection risk when used with dynamic values (Amendment 92 C1).
